title: Mobile drawer navigation switches to Users page
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can open the mobile drawer and navigate to the Users page from the dashboard shell.

steps.description: Click the hamburger menu on mobile to open the drawer
Click the navigation item for users
Verify the users management page is displayed

title: Unauthenticated access to Users redirects to Login
description: Verifies protected routes require authentication by redirecting unauthenticated users to the login page.

steps.description: Verify the login page is displayed

title: Authenticated sidebar navigation to Documents page
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can navigate from dashboard to the documents verification page via the sidebar navigation.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for documents
Verify the driver documents verification page is displayed

title: Authenticated sidebar navigation to SOS page
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can navigate to SOS alerts monitoring via the global navigation.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for SOS alerts
Verify the SOS alerts monitoring page is displayed

title: Authenticated sidebar navigation to Rides page
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can navigate to the rides list via the global navigation.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for rides
Verify the rides list page is displayed

title: Authenticated sidebar navigation to Bookings page
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can navigate to the bookings management page via the global navigation.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for bookings
Verify the bookings management page is displayed

title: Desktop sidebar collapses and still allows navigation
description: Verifies the sidebar can be collapsed on desktop and navigation continues to work when collapsed.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for dashboard
Verify the admin dashboard page is displayed

title: Admin login succeeds and lands on dashboard
description: Verifies an admin can authenticate with valid credentials and reach the dashboard.

steps.description: Verify the admin dashboard page is displayed

title: Admin login fails with invalid credentials
description: Verifies invalid credentials show an authentication error and the user remains on the login page.

steps.description: Fill invalid.user@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Verify an authentication error is visible
Verify the login page is displayed

title: Login form validation prevents empty submit
description: Verifies the login form shows validation errors when required fields are missing.

steps.description: Verify a required-field validation error is visible

title: Dashboard shows stat cards and opens an activity detail
description: Verifies the dashboard loads primary stats and an activity entry can be opened to view details.

steps.description: Click a recent activity entry to view details
Verify dashboard stat cards are displayed
Verify an activity detail view is displayed

title: Dashboard displays a loading state before showing stats
description: Verifies the dashboard presents a loading state while stats are being fetched, then shows the stat cards.

steps.description: Wait for the dashboard stats section to finish loading
Verify dashboard stat cards are displayed

title: Search users and toggle admin status from user entry
description: Verifies an admin can search for a user, open the user entry, toggle admin status, and see the updated status reflected in the list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the users section
Fill a common name fragment into the user search field
Open a user entry from the search results
Verify the opened user entry shows the admin status updated

title: Search for a non-existent user shows empty results state
description: Verifies searching with a query that matches no users shows an empty state for results.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the users section
Fill a unique random query into the user search field
Verify an empty state message is visible for user search results

title: Ban or unban a user from user entry
description: Verifies an admin can open a user entry and change the ban status, and the updated status is shown in the UI.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the users section
Fill a common phone-number fragment into the user search field
Open a user entry from the search results
Verify the opened user entry shows the ban status updated

title: Users page loads and shows user management content
description: Verifies the users page loads its primary content for managing users.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the users section
Verify a user list or table of users is displayed

title: Toggling admin status without selecting a user is not allowed
description: Verifies the UI prevents toggling admin status when no user entry is selected.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the users section
Attempt to click the toggle admin action from the list context without opening a user entry
Verify an inline validation or disabled-state feedback is visible indicating a user must be selected

title: Document queue loads and shows pending documents
description: Verifies the documents page loads and displays a pending document queue with visual previews.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the documents section
Verify a pending document queue is displayed with document thumbnails or previews

title: Approve a driver document from review
description: Verifies an admin can open a pending document and approve it, and the status updates to Approved in the UI.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the documents section
Open a document review from the pending queue
Verify the document status is shown as Approved

title: Reject a driver document with a reason
description: Verifies an admin can reject a pending document, provide a rejection reason, and see status and reason reflected.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the documents section
Open a document review from the pending queue
Fill Rejected due to unclear image into the rejection reason field
Verify the document status is shown as Rejected and the rejection reason includes Rejected due to unclear image

title: Reject action requires a reason
description: Verifies the UI enforces entering a rejection reason before allowing rejection submission.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the documents section
Open a document review from the pending queue
Submit the rejection without filling a reason
Verify a validation error is visible indicating a rejection reason is required

title: SOS alerts page loads and shows active alerts list
description: Verifies the SOS page loads and displays a list of SOS alerts for monitoring.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the SOS section
Verify a list of SOS alerts is displayed

title: Resolve an SOS alert from alert details
description: Verifies an admin can open an SOS alert, resolve it, and the alert is no longer shown as active.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the SOS section
Open an SOS alert from the list to view details
Verify the resolved alert is marked as resolved or removed from the active alerts list

title: Ride Management: View rides list and open ride details
description: Verifies an admin can access the rides page, see the rides list with key context, and open a ride details view.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for rides
Open a ride from the rides list to view details
Verify ride route, driver, and seat occupancy information are displayed

title: Ride Management: Force-cancel a ride from ride details
description: Verifies an admin can force-cancel a ride and see the ride status update to Cancelled in the UI.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for rides
Open a ride from the rides list to view details
Verify the ride status is updated to Cancelled
Verify a cancellation confirmation is visible

title: Ride Management: Cancel action requires confirmation or reversible UI state
description: Verifies the cancel flow does not immediately commit without an explicit confirmation step or final submission action within the UI.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for rides
Open a ride from the rides list to view details
Cancel out of the cancellation flow
Verify the ride remains in its previous non-cancelled status

title: Ride Management: Rides page primary content loads
description: Verifies the rides page loads and displays a list of rides for an authenticated admin.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for rides
Verify a list of rides is displayed
Verify each ride row shows route, driver, and seat occupancy context

title: Ride Management: Ride details includes map/route visualization when available
description: Verifies the ride details view shows route visualization information when provided by the UI.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for rides
Open a ride from the rides list to view details
Verify a route visualization or map view is displayed

title: Bookings Management: View bookings list and open booking details
description: Verifies an admin can access the bookings page, see the bookings list with linked passenger and ride context, and open booking details.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for bookings
Open a booking from the bookings list to view details
Verify linked passenger and ride context are displayed

title: Bookings Management: Update booking status and see it reflected in the list
description: Verifies an admin can update a booking status from details and see the updated status reflected back in the bookings list.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for bookings
Open a booking from the bookings list to view details
Select a different valid booking status
Return to the bookings list view
Verify the booking shows the updated status in the list
Verify an update confirmation is visible

title: Bookings Management: Search or filter yields no matches
description: Verifies searching or filtering bookings with a value that matches nothing shows a no results state.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for bookings
Fill a unique search query into the bookings search field
Submit or apply the bookings search/filter
Verify a no results message is visible
Verify the bookings list shows no matching rows

title: Bookings Management: Clear search/filter restores results
description: Verifies clearing an applied search/filter returns the bookings list back to a non-empty results state when data exists.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for bookings
Fill a unique search query into the bookings search field
Submit or apply the bookings search/filter
Verify the bookings list is displayed
Verify at least one booking row is displayed

title: Bookings Management: Bookings page primary content loads
description: Verifies the bookings page loads and displays the bookings list with passenger and ride context for an authenticated admin.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for bookings
Verify a list of bookings is displayed
Verify each booking row shows linked passenger and ride context
